exploration_notes: All changes are concentrated in a single file: `messageBlockquote.ts`. This file contains the `locateBlockquote` function and all related constants (`BLOCKQUOTE_SELECTORS`, `ELEMENTS_AFTER_BLOCKQUOTES`) and helpers (`testBlockquote`, `split`) that need modification. The requirements involve: (1) adding `blockquote[data-skiff-mail]` to BLOCKQUOTE_SELECTORS, (2) introducing ELEMENTS_AFTER_BLOCKQUOTES with `.proton-image-anchor`, (3) creating a `tmpDocument` variable for consistent document referen
